stonetop.summary: Hillfolk touched by the spirits, who guide and protect their band.

system.concept: Hillfolk touched by the spirits, who guide and protect their band.
system.description: Now and then a young Hillfolk shows signs of being touched by the spirits, often after a sickness or brush with death: they hear voices, and grow more comfortable with horse and hound than with their own people. Guided by an elder and possessed of great self-control, they become a spirit-talker for their band. (Those who lose the human tongue altogether go feral and become a gouzadn.)
